programmes.show_description: A loader malfunctions, causing chaos on the landing as Craig and Taylor struggle to move the 65-tonne winch. Meanwhile, the Glovers move to a new block on Erie Mountain.
Russell battles waterlogged tracks in the desert as he tries to deliver his load on time. Meanwhile, Yogi's reputation is hanging in the balance on the biggest week of his career.
In Northumberland bad weather causes an emergency on the A1 involving an 18-tonne truck. Plus a tricky recovery on the 17th fairway of a golf course when a beer truck grinds to a halt.
Recovery ops battle snow and ice to rescue a stricken fuel tanker that's slipped off a frozen track. Plus a road paver stuck in tarmac, and a broken down sweeper truck.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
As snow brings chaos to the roads of Essex, a knife-wielding man ruins New Year celebrations and the interceptors race to capture a gang of fugitives.
Biggers and Andy track down a suspected drug runner on the M25. Emily and Grant join forces with Ofcom to raid an illegal pirate radio station.
Western adventure. Searching for the murderer of his father, a young mountaineer is put in charge of a California-bound wagon train, leading his fellow pioneers to their destiny. (1930)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western adventure. Searching for the murderer of his father, a young mountaineer is put in charge of a California-bound wagon train, leading his fellow pioneers to their destiny. (1930)
Western. U.S. Marshal Bovard comes to a small border town to identify and arrest a fugitive, but the whole town seems determined to prevent the Marshal from doing his job. (1959)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. U.S. Marshal Bovard comes to a small border town to identify and arrest a fugitive, but the whole town seems determined to prevent the Marshal from doing his job. (1959)
Driver Alex has been tasked with moving not one, but two crushers to different sites, but on the backstreets of Bolton, his driving skills are put under serious pressure.
Traffic Cops from North and West Yorkshire hunt down disqualified, unlicenced and uninsured drivers.
Ron and Spence race to a scene of an alleged knife attack.
A suspected drug dealer crashes his bike into a hedge in a bid to escape. A man wanted for ABH is caught hiding in a bathroom.
Police follow up reports of an unauthorised car meet. Jamie investigates a stolen transit van, tracking down the driver who's cagey about his details.
We start with reports of a break-in at a garage. Officers receive a call about a fight with a knife and discover a trail of blood leading into a block of flats.
A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place.
A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie.
Scully and Mulder investigate a possible UFO crash site which Mulder believes the government is trying to cover up.
Craig and his crew log a burned forest north of Kamloops, but the lethal mix of ash and rain takes a toll on the machines and crew. Brent clears a fire guard around a homestead.
Russell McDonough is in the midst of an outback nightmare, when a track collapses under the weight of his rig. Meanwhile, Yogi has some family time, but trouble lies ahead.
Lantern recovery op Stuart is tasked with rescuing a 26-tonne sewage tanker, loaded with waste material, that has got its wheels wedged in a drainage ditch down a narrow muddy track.
The team endure an epic clean-up after a lorry carrying curry sauce jars collides with an artic. Gary battles a bin wagon on a dirt track. Euan has a tug of war with a tanker.

A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
A gang of burglars have broken into a house and swiped the keys to luxury cars. Then the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles.
Dog handler Tony comes across a most unusual sight - a naked man at the side of the road, and an unsuspecting lad sees his new 'bargain car' seized when it turns out to be cloned.
PC Martain Anderson deals with a driver with a reputation for being antagonistic, and PC Will Hunter happens upon a stolen car while taking a burger break!
PC Martain Anderson pursues a BMW driving on cloned plates. What do the driver and passengers have to hide? In Newcastle, a cop tails a car doing 50mph in a 30.
In Newcastle police crack down on drink and drug drivers and uninsured vehicles. And with lives at risk at a crash, officers must separate the truth from lies.
PCs Jan and Jamie are gobsmacked by a driver who doesn't seem to have a problem with drink driving. Later the duo pursues a car hitting a speed of 150mph.
Police follow up reports of an unauthorised car meet. Jamie investigates a stolen transit van, tracking down the driver who's cagey about his details.
Western starring Ray Milland and Hedy Lamarr. A group of veterans working as copper miners hire a sharpshooter to help them fend off a local gang. (1950)

A young man worships and competes with a famed gunfighter, insisting that he must face down a gang of 150 outlaws before he can retire. Western with Henry Fonda. (1973)

Western adventure starring Clint Eastwood and Inger Stevens. A cowboy hunts down the vigilantes who tried to hang him after mistaking him for a murderer. (1968)

Mulder and Scully investigate the deaths of men believed to have been killed by a powerful psychokinetic force.
